name: HRC_ALERT_RUN_LOG_LINES
description: Contains alert run Logs for a given run.

columns.Name: RUN_LOG_LINE_ID
columns.Comments: System generated primary key column.

columns.Name: RUN_ID
columns.Comments: Run Identifier. Foreign Key to HRC_ALERT_RUNS.RUN_ID

columns.Name: PHASE
columns.Comments: Specifies the Alert Run Phase. Valid values are: ORA_PHASE1,ORA_PHASE2,ORA_PHASE3

columns.Name: LOG_SOURCE
columns.Comments: Specifies the source of the Alert Log. Valid values are: Run,Message,Recipient,RecipientExpression,GroupByExpression,Template

columns.Name: LOG_WEIGHT
columns.Comments: Specifies the weight of the Alert Log record.

columns.Name: RUN_LANGUAGE
columns.Comments: Run Lanugage in which the Alert template is identified and Alert run is executed.

columns.Name: TEMPLATE_NAME
columns.Comments: Templates user defined name.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.

columns.Name: SURROGATE_ID
columns.Comments: SurrogateId of the record of the rest resource related table that is configured in the Alert.

columns.Name: PROP_NAME
columns.Comments: Property Name of the Alert Run Log record.

columns.Name: PROP_VALUE
columns.Comments: Property Value of the Alert Run Log record.

columns.Name: FUNC_NAME
columns.Comments: Function Name of the Alert Run Log record.

columns.Name: FUNC_ARG_NAME1
columns.Comments: Function First Argument Name of the record.

columns.Name: FUNC_ARG_VAL1
columns.Comments: Function First Argument Value of the record.

columns.Name: FUNC_ARG_NAME2
columns.Comments: Function Second Argument Name of the record.

columns.Name: FUNC_ARG_VAL2
columns.Comments: Function Second Argument Value of the record.

columns.Name: FUNC_ARG_NAME3
columns.Comments: Function Third Argument Name of the record.

columns.Name: FUNC_ARG_VAL3
columns.Comments: Function Third Argument Value of the record.

columns.Name: LOG_TYPE
columns.Comments: Log type of the Alert Run Log record.

columns.Name: LOG_SUBTYPE
columns.Comments: Log Subtype of the Alert Run Log record.
